meaning: n.[鍖朷涓欑儻閰哥洂,涓欑儻閰歌剛
examples: It introduces how to synthesize acrylic acid, acrylate and phenylethene quadripolymer into alcohol-soluble acrylic resin.
Synthetic resin of acrylate was prepared with solution polymerization.
The vulcanization behavior of acrylate rubber(ACM) cured with trithiocyanuric acid(TCY) was investigated.
